headline: Leantime AI Agent Integration Redesign
description:
Objective

Redesign and fully codify the Leantime automation layer as a first-class, mandatory part of every AI agent workflow in this repository.

Scope

  • New 10 - Leantime Integration Agent in all three extension systems
  • Updated LEANTIME_AUTOMATION.md with governing flow, time tracking policy, and HTML description template
  • retrospectives.* CLI alias in scripts/leantime/catalog.ts
  • Leantime step additions to all workflow files
  • AGENTS.md update with agent 10 and Leantime protocol section
  • HTML description template in docs/ai/templates/
  • Production board seeding (Blueprint + Retrospective)
  • Deferred canvas families task update
  • Secondary area documentation

Acceptance Criteria

  • Agent 10 definition files exist in all three extension systems
  • All workflows and prompts reference the Leantime integration protocol
  • retrospectives.* CLI alias implemented and passes typecheck
  • Production Blueprint board seeded
  • Production Retrospective board seeded
  • Time tracking policy documented
  • HTML description template available

Affected Areas

  • docs/ai/general/LEANTIME_AUTOMATION.md
  • docs/ai/general/10 - Leantime Integration Agent.md
  • AGENTS.md
  • scripts/leantime/catalog.ts
  • .github/agents/leantime-integration.agent.md
  • .agents/skills/leantime-integration/SKILL.md
  • All .zenflow/workflows/*.md files
  • All .github/prompts/*.prompt.md files
  • All .agents/skills/*/SKILL.md files
acceptanceCriteria:
- Agent 10 exists in all three extension systems
- All workflows reference Leantime protocol
- retrospectives.* CLI alias passes typecheck and smoke test
- Production boards seeded
- Time tracking and HTML template documented
